creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 237971
graphics/colmap: update to 3.7

This fixes the build on FreeBSD 13+ as colmap 3.6 doesn't build with the newest C++ standard.  While we are at it, claim maintainership over this unmaintained port.

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 i386 amd64 FreeBSD 13.1.
